# robots.txt for betterswitch.io

# Allow all search engines
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Allow AI training (OpenAI GPTBot)
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

# Allow AI training (Common Crawl)
User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

# Allow AI training (Google AI training)
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# Allow AI training (Anthropic Claude)
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

# Allow AI training (Facebook AI)
User-agent: FacebookBot
Allow: /

# Block problematic bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: *
Allow: /favicon.ico


# Crawl-delay (be nice to crawlers)
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://betterswitch.io/sitemap.xml
